'''Fnessal''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE" /> located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim's]] [[Fnessal system/Legends|Fnessal system]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Fnessian]] [[Species/Legends|species]],<ref name="CSWE" /> including the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Kn'ik Th'ronik]].<ref name="ND">[[No Disintegrations (West End Games)|''No Disintegrations'']]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Fnessal was first mentioned in [[West End Games]]' [[1997]] ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook [[No Disintegrations (West End Games)|''No Disintegrations'']].<ref name="ND" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Fnessal [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet Fnessal, in grid square K-14.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
